_meta.description: Drug contraindications by ICD-10 condition code. Clinician-reviewed heuristics.

N18.1.reason: CKD Stage 1 — NSAIDs worsen renal perfusion; avoid if possible

N18.2.reason: CKD Stage 2 — NSAIDs worsen renal perfusion; avoid if possible

N17.9.reason: Acute kidney injury — NSAIDs worsen AKI, avoid

K25.0.reason: Active gastric ulcer — NSAIDs increase GI bleeding risk

K26.0.reason: Active duodenal ulcer — NSAIDs increase GI bleeding risk

I50.9.reason: Heart failure — NSAIDs cause sodium retention, worsen CHF

N18.3.reason: CKD Stage 3+ — NSAIDs worsen renal function

K25.0.reason: Active gastric ulcer — NSAIDs increase bleeding risk

I50.9.reason: Heart failure — NSAIDs cause sodium/fluid retention

N18.4.reason: CKD Stage 4 (eGFR 15-29) — lactic acidosis risk, contraindicated

N18.5.reason: CKD Stage 5/ESRD — metformin contraindicated, lactic acidosis risk

N17.9.reason: Acute kidney injury — hold metformin until renal function recovers

K74.6.reason: Liver cirrhosis — lactic acidosis risk, contraindicated

G70.00.reason: Myasthenia gravis — fluoroquinolones can cause life-threatening exacerbation

G70.01.reason: Myasthenia gravis with exacerbation — fluoroquinolones contraindicated

M10.9.reason: Gout — fluoroquinolones can increase uric acid levels

G70.01.reason: Myasthenia gravis with exacerbation — absolute contraindication

I44.1.reason: AV block 2nd degree — moxifloxacin prolongs QT, avoid

N18.4.reason: CKD Stage 4 — reduce ciprofloxacin dose (renal excretion)

N18.5.reason: CKD Stage 5/ESRD — significant dose reduction required

K25.0.reason: Active gastric ulcer — warfarin increases GI bleeding risk

K70.3.reason: Alcoholic cirrhosis — unpredictable INR, bleeding risk

I61.9.reason: Hemorrhagic stroke — warfarin absolutely contraindicated acutely

K74.6.reason: Liver cirrhosis — clarithromycin hepatotoxicity risk, use alternative

J96.0.reason: Acute respiratory failure — opioids cause respiratory depression

J96.1.reason: Chronic respiratory failure — opioids worsen CO2 retention

G47.33.reason: Obstructive sleep apnea — opioids worsen apnea, avoid

N18.4.reason: CKD Stage 4 — morphine metabolite accumulates, causes CNS toxicity

N18.5.reason: CKD Stage 5/ESRD — avoid morphine, use fentanyl or hydromorphone instead
